ddls:
CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the template */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the question belongs to */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., String, Grid) */,
  "question_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the question */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is mandatory */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the question if none is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the metadata belongs to */,
  "question_no" INTEGER /* Question number */,
  "col_cnt" INTEGER /* Number of columns */,
  "row_cnt" INTEGER /* Number of rows */,
  "rows" TEXT /* Rows of the Grid question */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data types for each cell */,
  "columns" TEXT /* Column names */,
  "example_data" TEXT /* Example data to guide users on how to fill the grid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_metadata_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template used for the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person conducting the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_time" TEXT /* Time of the assessment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assessment */,
  "completion_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the assessment completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address or description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the priority belongs to */,
  "priority_text" TEXT /* Text of the priority */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Numeric level of priority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priorities_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "section_position" INTEGER /* Position of the section in the template */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, field team leader, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the progress belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the progress belongs to */,
  "progress_text" TEXT /* Text describing the progress */,
  "progress_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the question completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_codes" (
  "question_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question code */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the code belongs to */,
  "question_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the question */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_codes_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
